name: Execution timestamp
description: The date and time a transaction was entered into.
optionalityRules: Required for Action types NEWT, MODI, CORR, REVI.
Not reported for Action types EROR-<no Event type> and PRTO-PTNG.
valueRules: If Cleared is reported as Y, Execution timestamp is equal to Clearing timestamp.
For MODI, TERM, CORR, REVI, the original Execution timestamp of the trade as reported in a NEWT-<any Event type> report.
This data element remains unchanged throughout the life of the UTI for the OTC derivative.
